mapper.insert: insert ignore into dy_capture_batch( batch_no, room_key, douyin_user_id, payload_type, source, live_room_name, queue_size, item_count, report_time ) values( #{batchNo}, #{roomKey}, #{douyinUserId}, #{payloadType}, #{source}, #{liveRoomName}, #{queueSize}, #{itemCount}, sysdate() )

insert into dy_live_room( room_key, room_name, source, last_report_time, create_time, update_time ) values( #{roomKey}, #{roomName}, #{source}, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update room_name = if(values(room_name) is null or values(room_name) = '', room_name, values(room_name)), source = ifnull(values(source), source), last_report_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select:
select room_id, room_key, room_name, source, status, remark, last_report_time, create_time, update_time from dy_live_room
and room_key like concat('%', #{roomKey}, '%')
and room_name like concat('%', #{roomName}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by update_time desc, room_id desc
select room_id, room_key, room_name, source, status, remark, last_report_time, create_time, update_time from dy_live_room where room_key = #{roomKey} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into dy_live_room(room_key, room_name, source, status, remark, create_time, update_time) values(#{roomKey}, #{roomName}, #{source}, ifnull(#{status}, '0'), #{remark}, sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.select: select viewer_id from dy_viewer where sec_uid = #{secUid} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into dy_viewer( sec_uid, nickname, gender, first_seen_date, last_seen_date, create_time, update_time ) values( #{secUid}, #{nickname}, #{gender}, #{leadDate}, #{leadDate}, sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update nickname = values(nickname), gender = values(gender), last_seen_date = values(last_seen_date), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.update: update dy_viewer set nickname = #{nickname}, gender = #{gender}, last_seen_date = #{leadDate}, update_time = sysdate() where sec_uid = #{secUid}
mapper.insert: insert into dy_viewer_daily_lead( lead_date, room_key, douyin_user_id, live_room_name, viewer_id, sec_uid, nickname, create_time, update_time ) values( #{leadDate}, #{roomKey}, #{douyinUserId}, #{liveRoomName}, #{viewerId}, #{secUid}, #{nickname}, sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update douyin_user_id = values(douyin_user_id), live_room_name = values(live_room_name), viewer_id = values(viewer_id), nickname = values(nickname), update_time = sysdate()

insert ignore into dy_viewer_comment( lead_id, viewer_id, lead_date, room_key, douyin_user_id, sec_uid, nickname, content, dedupe_key, match_type, source, captured_at, create_time ) values( #{leadId}, #{viewerId}, #{leadDate}, #{roomKey}, #{douyinUserId}, #{secUid}, #{nickname}, #{content}, #{dedupeKey}, #{matchType}, #{source}, #{capturedAt}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update dy_viewer_daily_lead set has_comment = 1, comment_count = comment_count + 1, intent = 'high', first_comment_time = ifnull(first_comment_time, #{capturedAt}), last_comment_time = #{capturedAt}, last_comment_content = #{content}, update_time = sysdate() where lead_id = #{leadId}

update dy_viewer v set intent = 'high', has_comment = if((select count(1) from dy_viewer_comment c where c.viewer_id = #{viewerId}) > 0, 1, 0), comment_count = (select count(1) from dy_viewer_comment c where c.viewer_id = #{viewerId}), first_comment_time = (select min(c.captured_at) from dy_viewer_comment c where c.viewer_id = #{viewerId}), last_comment_time = (select max(c.captured_at) from dy_viewer_comment c where c.viewer_id = #{viewerId}), last_comment_content = ( select c.content from dy_viewer_comment c where c.viewer_id = #{viewerId} order by c.captured_at desc, c.comment_id desc limit 1 ), update_time = sysdate() where v.viewer_id = #{viewerId}

update dy_viewer v left join ( select viewer_id, count(1) as comment_count, min(captured_at) as first_comment_time, max(captured_at) as last_comment_time from dy_viewer_comment where viewer_id is not null group by viewer_id ) s on s.viewer_id = v.viewer_id left join ( select c.viewer_id, c.content from dy_viewer_comment c inner join ( select viewer_id, max(comment_id) as comment_id from dy_viewer_comment where viewer_id is not null group by viewer_id ) picked on picked.comment_id = c.comment_id ) last_comment on last_comment.viewer_id = v.viewer_id set v.has_comment = if(ifnull(s.comment_count, 0) > 0, 1, 0), v.comment_count = ifnull(s.comment_count, 0), v.intent = if(ifnull(s.comment_count, 0) > 0, 'high', v.intent), v.first_comment_time = s.first_comment_time, v.last_comment_time = s.last_comment_time, v.last_comment_content = last_comment.content, v.update_time = sysdate() where ifnull(v.has_comment, 0) != if(ifnull(s.comment_count, 0) > 0, 1, 0) or ifnull(v.comment_count, 0) != ifnull(s.comment_count, 0) or ifnull(v.last_comment_content, '') != ifnull(last_comment.content, '') or ifnull(v.last_comment_time, '1000-01-01') != ifnull(s.last_comment_time, '1000-01-01')

update dy_viewer_comment c inner join ( select c.comment_id, l.lead_id, l.viewer_id from dy_viewer_comment c inner join ( select c.comment_id, max(l.lead_id) as lead_id from dy_viewer_comment c inner join dy_viewer_daily_lead l on l.lead_date = c.lead_date and l.nickname = c.nickname where c.lead_id is null and c.viewer_id is null and c.nickname is not null and trim(c.nickname) != '' group by c.comment_id ) picked on picked.comment_id = c.comment_id inner join dy_viewer_daily_lead l on l.lead_id = picked.lead_id ) m on m.comment_id = c.comment_id set c.lead_id = m.lead_id, c.viewer_id = m.viewer_id, c.match_type = 'nickname_any_room'

update dy_viewer_daily_lead l set has_comment = if((select count(1) from dy_viewer_comment c where c.lead_id = #{leadId}) > 0, 1, 0), comment_count = (select count(1) from dy_viewer_comment c where c.lead_id = #{leadId}), intent = if((select count(1) from dy_viewer_comment c where c.lead_id = #{leadId}) > 0, 'high', intent), first_comment_time = (select min(c.captured_at) from dy_viewer_comment c where c.lead_id = #{leadId}), last_comment_time = (select max(c.captured_at) from dy_viewer_comment c where c.lead_id = #{leadId}), last_comment_content = ( select c.content from dy_viewer_comment c where c.lead_id = #{leadId} order by c.captured_at desc, c.comment_id desc limit 1 ), update_time = sysdate() where l.lead_id = #{leadId}

update dy_viewer_daily_lead l left join ( select lead_id, count(1) as comment_count, min(captured_at) as first_comment_time, max(captured_at) as last_comment_time from dy_viewer_comment where lead_id is not null group by lead_id ) s on s.lead_id = l.lead_id left join ( select c.lead_id, c.content from dy_viewer_comment c inner join ( select lead_id, max(comment_id) as comment_id from dy_viewer_comment where lead_id is not null group by lead_id ) picked on picked.comment_id = c.comment_id ) last_comment on last_comment.lead_id = l.lead_id set l.has_comment = if(ifnull(s.comment_count, 0) > 0, 1, 0), l.comment_count = ifnull(s.comment_count, 0), l.intent = if(ifnull(s.comment_count, 0) > 0, 'high', l.intent), l.first_comment_time = s.first_comment_time, l.last_comment_time = s.last_comment_time, l.last_comment_content = last_comment.content, l.update_time = sysdate() where ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) != if(ifnull(s.comment_count, 0) > 0, 1, 0) or ifnull(l.comment_count, 0) != ifnull(s.comment_count, 0) or ifnull(l.last_comment_content, '') != ifnull(last_comment.content, '') or ifnull(l.last_comment_time, '1000-01-01') != ifnull(s.last_comment_time, '1000-01-01')

update dy_viewer set owner_id = null, owner_name = null, owner_assigned_time = null, update_time = sysdate() where owner_name is not null and owner_name != '' and status not in ('ordered', 'pre_ordered') and (order_no is null or trim(order_no) = '') and owner_assigned_time is not null and owner_assigned_time < date_sub(sysdate(), interval 24 hour)

update dy_viewer_daily_lead set status = case when order_no is not null and trim(order_no) != '' and status = 'pre_ordered' then 'pre_ordered' when order_no is not null and trim(order_no) != '' then 'ordered' when lead_date < date_sub(curdate(), interval 1 month) then 'invalid' when owner_name is not null and trim(owner_name) != '' then 'following' else 'new' end, intent = case when has_comment = 1 then 'high' else intent end, update_time = sysdate() where lead_date >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 40 day) and (status != case when order_no is not null and trim(order_no) != '' and status = 'pre_ordered' then 'pre_ordered' when order_no is not null and trim(order_no) != '' then 'ordered' when lead_date < date_sub(curdate(), interval 1 month) then 'invalid' when owner_name is not null and trim(owner_name) != '' then 'following' else 'new' end or (has_comment = 1 and (intent is null or intent != 'high')))

update dy_viewer set status = case when order_no is not null and trim(order_no) != '' and status = 'pre_ordered' then 'pre_ordered' when order_no is not null and trim(order_no) != '' then 'ordered' when last_seen_date < date_sub(curdate(), interval 1 month) then 'invalid' when owner_name is not null and trim(owner_name) != '' then 'following' else 'new' end, intent = case when has_comment = 1 then 'high' else intent end, update_time = sysdate() where (last_seen_date is null or last_seen_date >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 40 day)) and (status != case when order_no is not null and trim(order_no) != '' and status = 'pre_ordered' then 'pre_ordered' when order_no is not null and trim(order_no) != '' then 'ordered' when last_seen_date < date_sub(curdate(), interval 1 month) then 'invalid' when owner_name is not null and trim(owner_name) != '' then 'following' else 'new' end or (has_comment = 1 and (intent is null or intent != 'high')))
mapper.select:
select distinct owner_name from dy_viewer where owner_name is not null and owner_name != ''
and owner_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by owner_name asc limit 20

select l.lead_id, l.lead_date, l.room_key, l.douyin_user_id, coalesce(nullif(r.room_name, ''), nullif(l.live_room_name, ''), l.room_key) as display_room_name, coalesce(nullif(r.room_name, ''), nullif(l.live_room_name, ''), l.room_key) as live_room_name, v.viewer_id, v.sec_uid, coalesce(nullif(v.nickname, ''), l.nickname) as nickname, ifnull(v.has_comment, 0) as has_comment, ifnull(v.comment_count, 0) as comment_count, v.first_comment_time, v.last_comment_time, v.last_comment_content, ifnull(v.status, 'new') as status, ifnull(v.intent, 'unknown') as intent, v.owner_id, v.owner_name, v.owner_assigned_time, v.order_no, v.remark, v.last_follow_time, v.manual_update_time, v.first_seen_date, v.last_seen_date, l.create_time, greatest(ifnull(v.update_time, l.update_time), l.update_time) as update_time from dy_viewer_daily_lead l inner join dy_viewer v on v.viewer_id = l.viewer_id left join dy_live_room r on r.room_key = l.room_key where l.lead_id = #{leadId}
select c.* from dy_viewer_comment c inner join dy_viewer_daily_lead l on l.viewer_id = c.viewer_id where l.lead_id = #{leadId} order by c.captured_at desc

select max(l.lead_id) as lead_id, l.lead_date, group_concat(distinct l.room_key order by l.room_key separator ',') as room_key, group_concat(distinct coalesce(nullif(r.room_name, ''), nullif(l.live_room_name, ''), l.room_key) order by coalesce(nullif(r.room_name, ''), nullif(l.live_room_name, ''), l.room_key) separator '、') as live_room_name, max(ifnull(l.has_comment, 0)) as has_comment, sum(ifnull(l.comment_count, 0)) as comment_count, min(l.first_comment_time) as first_comment_time, max(l.last_comment_time) as last_comment_time, substring_index( group_concat(nullif(l.last_comment_content, '') order by l.last_comment_time desc, l.lead_id desc separator '\n'), '\n', 1 ) as last_comment_content, min(l.create_time) as create_time, max(l.update_time) as update_time from dy_viewer_daily_lead l left join dy_live_room r on r.room_key = l.room_key where l.viewer_id = (select viewer_id from dy_viewer_daily_lead where lead_id = #{leadId}) group by l.viewer_id, l.lead_date order by l.lead_date desc, max(l.update_time) desc

select f.*, case when f.operator_name is null or trim(f.operator_name) = '' or f.operator_name in ('admin', 'ry', '负责人') then nullif(v.owner_name, '') else f.operator_name end as display_owner_name from dy_viewer_follow_record f inner join dy_viewer_daily_lead l on l.viewer_id = f.viewer_id left join dy_viewer v on v.viewer_id = f.viewer_id where l.lead_id = #{leadId} order by f.create_time desc
mapper.update:
update dy_viewer
status = #{status}, intent = #{intent}, owner_id = #{ownerId}, owner_name = nullif(#{ownerName}, ''), owner_assigned_time = #{ownerAssignedTime}, order_no = #{orderNo}, remark = #{remark}, manual_update_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate()
where viewer_id = ( select viewer_id from dy_viewer_daily_lead where lead_id = #{leadId} )
mapper.insert: insert into dy_viewer_follow_record( lead_id, viewer_id, follow_content, follow_result, next_follow_time, operator_id, operator_name, create_time ) values( #{leadId}, #{viewerId}, #{followContent}, #{followResult}, #{nextFollowTime}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, sysdate() )

sql.if: and coalesce(nullif(r.room_name, ''), nullif(l.live_room_name, ''), l.room_key) like concat('%', #{roomName}, '%')

mapper.select:
select count(distinct l.viewer_id) as viewerCount, count(distinct l.lead_id) as visitCount, count(distinct coalesce(nullif(r.room_name, ''), nullif(l.live_room_name, ''), l.room_key)) as shopCount, sum(case when ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 or ifnull(v.has_comment, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as commentLeadCount, sum(ifnull(l.comment_count, 0)) as commentCount, sum(case when ifnull(v.status, 'new') = 'new' then 1 else 0 end) as newCount, sum(case when ifnull(v.status, 'new') = 'following' then 1 else 0 end) as followingCount, sum(case when ifnull(v.status, 'new') = 'pre_ordered' then 1 else 0 end) as preOrderedCount, sum(case when ifnull(v.status, 'new') = 'ordered' then 1 else 0 end) as orderedCount, count(distinct case when f.viewer_id is not null then l.viewer_id end) as followedViewerCount, count(distinct case when nullif(v.owner_name, '') is not null then l.viewer_id end) as assignedViewerCount, sum(case when (ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 or ifnull(v.has_comment, 0) = 1) and nullif(v.owner_name, '') is null and ifnull(v.status, 'new') not in ('ordered', 'pre_ordered', 'invalid') then 1 else 0 end) as unassignedHighIntentCount, sum(case when nullif(v.owner_name, '') is not null and f.viewer_id is null and ifnull(v.status, 'new') not in ('ordered', 'pre_ordered', 'invalid') then 1 else 0 end) as pendingFollowCount, round(sum(case when ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 or ifnull(v.has_comment, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end) * 100 / nullif(count(distinct l.viewer_id), 0), 2) as commentRate, round(count(distinct case when nullif(v.owner_name, '') is not null then l.viewer_id end) * 100 / nullif(sum(case when ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 or ifnull(v.has_comment, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end), 0), 2) as assignRate, round(count(distinct case when f.viewer_id is not null then l.viewer_id end) * 100 / nullif(count(distinct case when nullif(v.owner_name, '') is not null then l.viewer_id end), 0), 2) as followRate, round(sum(case when ifnull(v.status, 'new') = 'ordered' then 1 else 0 end) * 100 / nullif(sum(case when ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 or ifnull(v.has_comment, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end), 0), 2) as orderRate, max(greatest(ifnull(l.update_time, '1000-01-01'), ifnull(v.update_time, '1000-01-01'))) as lastUpdateTime from dy_viewer_daily_lead l inner join dy_viewer v on v.viewer_id = l.viewer_id left join dy_live_room r on r.room_key = l.room_key left join ( select distinct viewer_id from dy_viewer_follow_record ) f on f.viewer_id = l.viewer_id
1 = 1

select l.lead_date as statDate, count(distinct l.viewer_id) as viewerCount, count(1) as visitCount, sum(case when ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as commentLeadCount, sum(ifnull(l.comment_count, 0)) as commentCount, sum(case when ifnull(v.status, 'new') = 'following' then 1 else 0 end) as followingCount, sum(case when ifnull(v.status, 'new') = 'pre_ordered' then 1 else 0 end) as preOrderedCount, sum(case when ifnull(v.status, 'new') = 'ordered' then 1 else 0 end) as orderedCount, sum(case when (ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 or ifnull(v.has_comment, 0) = 1) and nullif(v.owner_name, '') is null and ifnull(v.status, 'new') not in ('ordered', 'pre_ordered', 'invalid') then 1 else 0 end) as unassignedHighIntentCount from dy_viewer_daily_lead l inner join dy_viewer v on v.viewer_id = l.viewer_id left join dy_live_room r on r.room_key = l.room_key
1 = 1
group by l.lead_date order by l.lead_date asc

select coalesce(nullif(r.room_name, ''), nullif(l.live_room_name, ''), l.room_key) as roomName, count(distinct l.viewer_id) as viewerCount, count(1) as visitCount, sum(case when ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as commentLeadCount, sum(ifnull(l.comment_count, 0)) as commentCount, sum(case when ifnull(v.status, 'new') = 'following' then 1 else 0 end) as followingCount, sum(case when ifnull(v.status, 'new') = 'pre_ordered' then 1 else 0 end) as preOrderedCount, sum(case when ifnull(v.status, 'new') = 'ordered' then 1 else 0 end) as orderedCount, sum(case when ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 and nullif(v.owner_name, '') is null and ifnull(v.status, 'new') not in ('ordered', 'pre_ordered', 'invalid') then 1 else 0 end) as unassignedHighIntentCount, round(sum(case when ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end) * 100 / nullif(count(distinct l.viewer_id), 0), 2) as commentRate, round(sum(case when ifnull(v.status, 'new') = 'ordered' then 1 else 0 end) * 100 / nullif(sum(case when ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end), 0), 2) as orderRate from dy_viewer_daily_lead l inner join dy_viewer v on v.viewer_id = l.viewer_id left join dy_live_room r on r.room_key = l.room_key
1 = 1
group by coalesce(nullif(r.room_name, ''), nullif(l.live_room_name, ''), l.room_key) order by commentLeadCount desc, viewerCount desc limit 10

select coalesce(nullif(r.room_name, ''), nullif(l.live_room_name, ''), l.room_key) as shopName, count(distinct l.viewer_id) as viewerCount, count(1) as visitCount, sum(case when ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 or ifnull(v.has_comment, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as highIntentCount, count(distinct case when nullif(v.owner_name, '') is not null then l.viewer_id end) as assignedViewerCount, count(distinct case when f.viewer_id is not null then l.viewer_id end) as followedViewerCount, sum(case when ifnull(v.status, 'new') = 'ordered' then 1 else 0 end) as orderedCount, sum(case when (ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 or ifnull(v.has_comment, 0) = 1) and nullif(v.owner_name, '') is null and ifnull(v.status, 'new') not in ('ordered', 'pre_ordered', 'invalid') then 1 else 0 end) as unassignedHighIntentCount, round(sum(case when ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 or ifnull(v.has_comment, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end) * 100 / nullif(count(distinct l.viewer_id), 0), 2) as highIntentRate, round(count(distinct case when nullif(v.owner_name, '') is not null then l.viewer_id end) * 100 / nullif(sum(case when ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 or ifnull(v.has_comment, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end), 0), 2) as assignRate, round(count(distinct case when f.viewer_id is not null then l.viewer_id end) * 100 / nullif(count(distinct case when nullif(v.owner_name, '') is not null then l.viewer_id end), 0), 2) as followRate, round(sum(case when ifnull(v.status, 'new') = 'ordered' then 1 else 0 end) * 100 / nullif(sum(case when ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 or ifnull(v.has_comment, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end), 0), 2) as orderRate, round( ifnull(sum(case when ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 or ifnull(v.has_comment, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end) * 100 / nullif(count(distinct l.viewer_id), 0), 0) * 0.25 + ifnull(count(distinct case when nullif(v.owner_name, '') is not null then l.viewer_id end) * 100 / nullif(sum(case when ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 or ifnull(v.has_comment, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end), 0), 0) * 0.25 + ifnull(count(distinct case when f.viewer_id is not null then l.viewer_id end) * 100 / nullif(count(distinct case when nullif(v.owner_name, '') is not null then l.viewer_id end), 0), 0) * 0.25 + ifnull(sum(case when ifnull(v.status, 'new') = 'ordered' then 1 else 0 end) * 100 / nullif(sum(case when ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 or ifnull(v.has_comment, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end), 0), 0) * 0.25 , 2) as shopScore from dy_viewer_daily_lead l inner join dy_viewer v on v.viewer_id = l.viewer_id left join dy_live_room r on r.room_key = l.room_key left join ( select distinct viewer_id from dy_viewer_follow_record ) f on f.viewer_id = l.viewer_id
1 = 1
group by coalesce(nullif(r.room_name, ''), nullif(l.live_room_name, ''), l.room_key) order by shopScore desc, orderedCount desc, highIntentCount desc limit 20

select ifnull(nullif(v.owner_name, ''), '未分配') as ownerName, count(distinct l.viewer_id) as viewerCount, sum(case when ifnull(l.has_comment, 0) = 1 or ifnull(v.has_comment, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as commentLeadCount, count(distinct case when f.viewer_id is not null then l.viewer_id end) as followedViewerCount, sum(case when ifnull(v.status, 'new') = 'ordered' then 1 else 0 end) as orderedCount, round(count(distinct case when f.viewer_id is not null then l.viewer_id end) * 100 / nullif(count(distinct l.viewer_id), 0), 2) as followRate, round(sum(case when ifnull(v.status, 'new') = 'ordered' then 1 else 0 end) * 100 / nullif(count(distinct case when f.viewer_id is not null then l.viewer_id end), 0), 2) as orderRate, max(v.last_follow_time) as lastFollowTime from dy_viewer_daily_lead l inner join dy_viewer v on v.viewer_id = l.viewer_id left join dy_live_room r on r.room_key = l.room_key left join ( select distinct viewer_id from dy_viewer_follow_record ) f on f.viewer_id = l.viewer_id
1 = 1
group by ifnull(nullif(v.owner_name, ''), '未分配') order by orderedCount desc, followedViewerCount desc, commentLeadCount desc limit 12

select keyword, count(1) as hitCount from ( select '价格' as keyword from dy_viewer_comment c left join dy_viewer_daily_lead l on l.lead_id = c.lead_id left join dy_viewer v on v.viewer_id = c.viewer_id left join dy_live_room r on r.room_key = c.room_key
1 = 1 and c.lead_id is not null and c.viewer_id is not null and c.lead_date = #{leadDate} and c.lead_date >= #{beginLeadDate} and c.lead_date <= #{endLeadDate} and coalesce(nullif(r.room_name, ''), nullif(l.live_room_name, ''), c.room_key) like concat('%', #{roomName}, '%') and v.owner_name like concat('%', #{ownerName}, '%') and (c.content like '%价格%' or c.content like '%多少钱%' or c.content like '%价%' or c.content like '%便宜%')
union all select '赠品' from dy_viewer_comment c left join dy_viewer_daily_lead l on l.lead_id = c.lead_id left join dy_viewer v on v.viewer_id = c.viewer_id left join dy_live_room r on r.room_key = c.room_key
1 = 1 and c.lead_id is not null and c.viewer_id is not null and c.lead_date = #{leadDate} and c.lead_date >= #{beginLeadDate} and c.lead_date <= #{endLeadDate} and coalesce(nullif(r.room_name, ''), nullif(l.live_room_name, ''), c.room_key) like concat('%', #{roomName}, '%') and v.owner_name like concat('%', #{ownerName}, '%') and (c.content like '%赠品%' or c.content like '%送%' or c.content like '%活动%')
union all select '型号对比' from dy_viewer_comment c left join dy_viewer_daily_lead l on l.lead_id = c.lead_id left join dy_viewer v on v.viewer_id = c.viewer_id left join dy_live_room r on r.room_key = c.room_key
1 = 1 and c.lead_id is not null and c.viewer_id is not null and c.lead_date = #{leadDate} and c.lead_date >= #{beginLeadDate} and c.lead_date <= #{endLeadDate} and coalesce(nullif(r.room_name, ''), nullif(l.live_room_name, ''), c.room_key) like concat('%', #{roomName}, '%') and v.owner_name like concat('%', #{ownerName}, '%') and (c.content like '%区别%' or c.content like '%对比%' or c.content like '%型号%' or c.content like '%哪个好%')
union all select '发货安装' from dy_viewer_comment c left join dy_viewer_daily_lead l on l.lead_id = c.lead_id left join dy_viewer v on v.viewer_id = c.viewer_id left join dy_live_room r on r.room_key = c.room_key
1 = 1 and c.lead_id is not null and c.viewer_id is not null and c.lead_date = #{leadDate} and c.lead_date >= #{beginLeadDate} and c.lead_date <= #{endLeadDate} and coalesce(nullif(r.room_name, ''), nullif(l.live_room_name, ''), c.room_key) like concat('%', #{roomName}, '%') and v.owner_name like concat('%', #{ownerName}, '%') and (c.content like '%发货%' or c.content like '%安装%' or c.content like '%上门%' or c.content like '%包邮%')
union all select '售后保障' from dy_viewer_comment c left join dy_viewer_daily_lead l on l.lead_id = c.lead_id left join dy_viewer v on v.viewer_id = c.viewer_id left join dy_live_room r on r.room_key = c.room_key
1 = 1 and c.lead_id is not null and c.viewer_id is not null and c.lead_date = #{leadDate} and c.lead_date >= #{beginLeadDate} and c.lead_date <= #{endLeadDate} and coalesce(nullif(r.room_name, ''), nullif(l.live_room_name, ''), c.room_key) like concat('%', #{roomName}, '%') and v.owner_name like concat('%', #{ownerName}, '%') and (c.content like '%售后%' or c.content like '%保修%' or c.content like '%退%' or c.content like '%七天%')
) k group by keyword order by hitCount desc
